IntProperty1Hint:
Determines the type of hoop this will be
0 = Orange
1 = Yellow
2 = Green
3 = Blue
4 = Light Blue
5+ = Magenta
IntProperty2Hint: Determines how far the hoop can launch you.
FloatProperty1Hint:
Determines how long a hoop will hold you before releasing
Higher numbers mean a faster release,
however 0 will never release
Below 0 will instantly release.
FloatProperty2Hint:
Determines how far left or right a hoop
will travel before launching
This is relative to the
hoop's set rotation.
FloatProperty3Hint:
Determines how far forward or back a hoop
will travel before launching
This is relative to the
hoop's set rotation.
FloatProperty4Hint:
Determines how far up or down a hoop
will travel before launching
This is relative to the
hoop's set rotation.
